name: Sun Bin

skills.name: Hourglass of Time
skills.description: Gains a Movement Speed bonus after using skills.

skills.name: Time Bomb
skills.description: Fires a bomb in the target direction, which deals damage and attaches itself to the hit enemy. After a brief delay, inflicts AoE damage and slow.

skills.name: Time Flux
skills.description: Timebender and nearby teammates within range gain increased Movement Speed. When the effect ends, restores Health equal to 25% of the damage taken while the effect was active. Passive: Gains Cooldown Reduction.

skills.name: Time Lapse
skills.description: Throws a bomb in the target direction, inflicting AoE damage, slow, and silence upon coming in contact with an enemy or reaching its max range. After a brief delay, the bomb deals AoE damage again.
